description: Large-scale corpus of read English speech from LibriVox audiobooks, 16kHz, segmented and aligned. Widely used ASR benchmark.
Crowdsourced multilingual speech dataset. Volunteers read sentences; community-validated. Largest open multilingual speech corpus by language count.
Multi-domain English speech corpus from audiobooks, podcasts, and YouTube. Includes punctuated transcriptions. Designed for ASR and beyond.
Large-scale multilingual in-the-wild speech dataset for speech generation (TTS). Diverse speaking styles from real-world sources. Includes Emilia-Pipe preprocessing pipeline.
Large-scale multilingual speech corpus from European Parliament recordings. Includes unlabelled audio and transcribed subsets for ASR and speech translation.
Large-scale conversational English speech corpus from MLCommons. Sourced from diverse public domain sources for ASR training and evaluation.
Large-scale multilingual Southeast Asian speech corpus from YouTube and podcasts. Extends GigaSpeech to cover low-resource SE Asian languages.
Massive ASR corpus from LibriVox audiobooks with punctuation, casing, and text context. Includes alignment toolkit.
Large-scale speech dataset for recognition and translation across 25 European languages. First open-source effort at this scale for both tasks.
Evolving multilingual corpus from YouTube videos. 15 languages with transcribed ASR data. Competitive with Whisper when combined with other corpora.
High-fidelity multi-speaker English TTS dataset. 10 speakers with at least 17 hours each, sampled at 44.1 kHz from LibriVox audiobooks.
Large audio dataset of spoken words in 50 languages for keyword spotting and spoken term search. Over 340,000 keywords.
Ryerson Audio-Visual Database of Emotional Speech and Song. 7356 files from 24 professional actors with 8 emotions.
Interactive Emotional Dyadic Motion Capture database from USC. Multimodal (audio+video+text) emotional speech with 10 speakers.
Global multi-technique singing corpus with realistic music scores. NeurIPS 2024 Spotlight. Designed for all singing tasks.
Singing voice dataset with 20 professional singers demonstrating standard and extended vocal techniques on all 5 vowels.
Large-scale in-the-wild singing voice dataset with various languages, singers, and styles. Open-source processing pipeline.
Standard benchmark for music source separation. 150 full-track songs with isolated stems (vocals, drums, bass, other).
Music source separation dataset beyond 4-stems. 240 tracks with fine-grained stem annotations across multiple genres.
Microsoft Deep Noise Suppression Challenge dataset. Clean speech and noise clips for training speech enhancement models.
Open dataset of 51,197 human-labeled sound events from Freesound. 200 sound classes based on AudioSet ontology.
Google's large-scale audio event dataset. 2M+ human-labeled 10-second YouTube clips across 632 sound event categories.
Environmental Sound Classification dataset. 2000 five-second recordings in 50 classes across 5 major categories.
Community-driven bird sound collection from around the world. 800,000+ recordings of 10,000+ bird species.
Crowdsourced cough audio dataset for respiratory disease detection. Expert-labeled subset of 2,800+ recordings.
Open-source Mandarin speech corpus. 400 speakers from different accent areas recorded in quiet indoor environment.
Large-scale Mandarin speech corpus covering wake words, voice control, smart home, autonomous driving, and more.
Multi-domain Mandarin corpus from YouTube and Podcasts. 10,000+ hours labeled, 2,400+ weakly labeled, ~10,000 unlabeled.
Large-scale spontaneous Korean speech corpus. ~2,000 native Korean speakers in open-domain dialog conversations.
Free Korean speech corpus for ASR. Includes pre-trained language model and lexicon. Read speech from volunteers.
Large-scale spontaneous Japanese speech corpus. Academic talks, simulated public speaking, and dialog. Richly annotated.
Multimodal dataset of English four-person meetings with synchronized audio, video, and annotations for dialogue analysis.
Far-field speech in noisy home environments. Multi-microphone recordings of dinner parties for robust ASR research.
Large-scale speaker recognition dataset. 1M+ utterances from 7,000+ celebrities. Widely used for speaker verification.
One-second audio clips of 35 spoken words for keyword spotting. Designed for small-footprint on-device models.
Multi-speaker English corpus. 109 speakers with diverse accents reading newspaper sentences. Popular for TTS and voice conversion.
Single-speaker English TTS dataset. 13,100 short audio clips from a female speaker reading passages from 7 non-fiction books.
Multi-speaker English corpus for TTS research derived from LibriSpeech. Clean audio at 24kHz with sentence-level splits.
TED talks ASR corpus. 2,351 talks with aligned transcriptions. Widely used benchmark for speech recognition.
Large-scale multilingual speech translation corpus built on Common Voice. Covers translation from 21 languages into English.
Multilingual Speech Translation Corpus from TED talks. English audio paired with translations in 14 target languages.
Few-shot Learning Evaluation of Universal Representations of Speech. Parallel speech data across 102 languages for evaluation.
Large collection of podcast episodes with transcripts. Released for research in speech and NLP tasks.
Real meeting recordings with 8-mic circular array. Multi-speaker Mandarin with ~42% overlap ratio. For diarization and ASR.
French expressive speech database. 25 actors portraying 4 interpersonal attitudes with 22,000+ utterances.
Large French audiobook corpus from Audiocite platform. For self-supervised pre-training and French ASR research.
Music, Speech, and Noise corpus. Diverse collection for data augmentation in speech/audio processing tasks.
Urban sound classification dataset. 8,732 labeled sound excerpts of 10 urban sound classes from field recordings.
Open dataset of spoken digits (0-9). 3,000 recordings from 6 speakers. Simple benchmark for audio classification.
MIDI and Audio Edited for Synchronous TRacks and Organization. 200 hours of virtuosic piano performances with aligned MIDI.
Large-scale dataset of annotated musical notes from 1,006 instruments. Each note has pitch, velocity, and instrument labels.
Open and easily accessible music dataset. 106k tracks from 16,341 artists in 161 genres for music analysis research.
Large-scale audio captioning dataset. ~50,000 audio clips from AudioSet with human-written captions.
Audio captioning dataset with 4,981 audio samples. Each clip has 5 captions. Designed for automated audio captioning.
Large-scale unlabeled English speech dataset from LibriVox. Designed for semi-supervised and unsupervised speech research.
Transcribed financial English audio. Professional transcripts from S&P Global earnings calls with formatting annotations.
ASR benchmark of earnings calls. Long-form English audio with diverse accents and financial terminology.
Multimodal corpus pairing speech with presentation slides. For contextual ASR using visual document information.
YouTube-Oriented Dataset for Audio and Speech. Massive multilingual corpus from YouTube for speech/audio research.
Language identification dataset from YouTube. Short speech segments covering 107 languages for spoken LID.
Large multilingual read speech corpus from LibriVox. English, German, Dutch, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Polish.
Classic conversational English telephone speech corpus. ~2,400 two-sided telephone conversations among 543 speakers.
Phonemically balanced read English speech corpus. 630 speakers of 8 major dialects. Standard benchmark for phoneme recognition.
Meta's massive multilingual speech corpus for ASR. Covers over 1,600 languages including 350+ previously underserved.
Anechoic fullband speech dataset for speech enhancement and dereverberation. Multiple speaking styles and emotional speech.
Dataset and benchmark for classification in avian bioacoustics. Sourced from Xeno-Canto with expert-annotated soundscapes.
Collection of datasets for sound event detection, acoustic scene classification, and audio tagging from DCASE challenges.
Open-access dataset for sound event detection of outdoor environmental noise. 717 WAV audio tracks at 44.1 kHz.
Largest public dataset for keyword spotting. Generated using forced alignment tools with public datasets.
Vocal Burst dataset from Hume AI for non-speech vocalization understanding. Annotated for emotional expression.
Code-switching speech corpus. Mandarin-English conversational and interview speech from bilingual speakers in SE Asia.
Large conversational English telephone speech corpus. ~11,000 conversations on assigned topics between strangers.
Classic read English speech corpus from Wall Street Journal text. Standard ASR benchmark dataset.
Community-contributed open speech corpus. Users submit recordings for ASR development in multiple languages.
Multilingual speech dataset for TTS research. German, English, Spanish, Italian, Ukrainian, Russian, French, Polish, Georgian.
Crowd-sourced Emotional Multimodal Actors Dataset. 7,442 clips from 91 actors with 6 emotions at 4 intensity levels.
Surrey Audio-Visual Expressed Emotion database. 480 utterances from 4 male actors expressing 7 emotions.
Classic emotional speech database. 535 utterances from 10 professional actors expressing 7 emotions in German.
Dataset of professional and amateur recordings. 20 speakers reading 5 passages each in multiple recording conditions.
Speech translation dataset built on GigaSpeech. Pseudo labels for English-German and English-Chinese translation.
Speech translation corpus from European Parliament proceedings. Aligned speech-translation pairs for 9 language pairs.
Telephone speech corpus in 6 languages. Unscripted conversations between native speakers. Used for diarization benchmarks.
Chinese celebrity speech dataset for speaker recognition. Multi-genre recordings from 3,000 Chinese celebrities.
Respiratory sound dataset including cough, breathing, and voice samples for COVID-19 diagnosis research.
Modern Standard Arabic speech corpus for TTS. Professional recordings with phoneme-level alignment and stress annotations.
Multilingual TTS dataset from LibriVox audiobooks. Dutch, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Polish, Spanish.
TTS corpus for 10 African languages from Bible recordings. High-quality single-speaker recordings per language.
Acted Emotional Speech Dynamic Database. Greek emotional speech for speech emotion recognition research.
Phone-annotated multilingual speech corpus from Common Voice. Phonetic annotations for French, German, Italian, Spanish, etc.
Japanese large-scale spoken dialogue corpus. Open-source, automatically collected from web for conversational speech research.
Japanese emotional speech corpus with verbal and nonverbal vocalizations. Phoneme-balanced with emotion annotations.
Multi-sensor French speech corpus using body-conduction sensors. Novel dataset for alternative speech capture methods.
Large-scale Russian ASR dataset. Crowdsourced and scraped recordings for Russian speech recognition.
Multitrack music dataset for source separation and pitch tracking. 122 songs with instrument annotations.
Instrument Recognition in Musical Audio Signals. Audio excerpts annotated with predominant instrument labels.
Phonocardiogram dataset from PhysioNet/CinC 2016 Challenge. Heart sound recordings classified as normal or abnormal.
Whispered speech corpus for studying whispered vs normal speech. Multiple speakers with parallel recordings.
Children's speech corpus from Oregon Graduate Institute. Read and spontaneous speech from children aged 5-15.
Children's conversational speech corpus. Students aged 8-11 conversing with virtual science tutor.
Elderly speech corpus from Cookie Theft picture descriptions. Used for dementia/Alzheimer's detection research.
Non-native English speech corpus. 24 speakers from 6 L1 backgrounds with phonetic error annotations.
Diverse Environments Multichannel Acoustic Noise Database. 18 real-world noise environments recorded with 16-channel arrays.
Room impulse responses for simulating reverberant environments. Used for data augmentation in speech processing.
Urban acoustic scene classification dataset from DCASE. 10 acoustic scene classes recorded in 12 European cities.
Music genre classification dataset. 1,000 30-second tracks across 10 genres. Classic music IR benchmark.
Large classical music dataset with aligned dynamic MIDI annotations. 330 freely-licensed recordings.
Citizen science whale call classification dataset. Orca and pilot whale call recordings for marine bioacoustics.
Watkins Marine Mammal Sound Database from Woods Hole. 15,000+ recordings of 187 species of marine mammals.
Variably Intense Vocalizations of Affect and Emotion. Non-speech vocalizations rated for emotional dimensions.
Clean Single-Speaker Speech dataset for TTS. Single speakers in 10 languages from LibriVox audiobooks.
Real-world meeting Mandarin speech corpus. 8-channel circular microphone array recordings in multiple rooms.
Code-switching Mandarin-English corpus from Hong Kong. Spontaneous conversational speech with language labels.
Extension of GigaSpeech covering African language speech data for ASR research in low-resource settings.
Conversational Mandarin speech corpus. Mobile recordings from 1,000+ speakers across China.
Large-scale curated English ASR corpus with diverse accents and speech types (read, spontaneous, talks, clean, noisy). Hundreds of thousands of speakers. Commercially usable.
Massive multilingual audio dataset built from Archive.org recordings. Public domain or CC-BY/CC-BY-SA licensed audio for unsupervised speech model training.
Large-scale audio-visual speaker recognition dataset with ~10M utterances from 110K+ speakers in the wild. Extracted from YouTube.
Large-scale speech corpus for speaker verification and recognition with disentangled speech representations. Multi-modal (audio + visual).
Broad Sound Dataset with 10,000+ Freesound audio clips annotated according to 23 second-level classes of the Broad Sound Taxonomy (BST).
Free Chinese speech corpus released by CSLT@Tsinghua University. Read speech for ASR research.
Free Uyghur speech database released by CSLT@Tsinghua University & Xinjiang University for ASR.
Chinese Mandarin speech corpus by Beijing DataTang Technology. 200 hours from 600 speakers with >98% transcription accuracy.
Chinese Mandarin corpus by Shanghai Primewords Co. Ltd. containing 100 hours of speech data.
Multi-speaker Mandarin TTS corpus by Beijing Shell Shell Technology. High-quality recordings for speech synthesis research.
Crowdsourced open-source Kazakh speech corpus developed by ISSAI for ASR research.
Russian speech corpus based on LibriVox audiobooks for ASR research.
Emotional speech database for synthesis and generation. Male and female actors with multiple emotions.
Crowdsourced Icelandic speech corpus (Samrómur) including adult speakers, children, and query-focused subsets.
Pronunciation scoring dataset with utterances labeled independently by five human experts.
Media speech datasets from broadcast news for ASR evaluation in 4 languages.
Free single German speaker TTS dataset by Thorsten Müller for text-to-speech training.
Free emotional single German speaker dataset (8 emotions) by Thorsten Müller for TTS training.
Korean Corpus of Spontaneous Speech created from NRF(Korea)-funded project for speech research.
Database of recordings of real-world sounds and measured room impulse responses for audio scene analysis.
Far-field text-dependent speaker verification database for AISHELL Speaker Verification Challenge 2019.
Chinese hotwords/wake-word detection dataset provided by Mobvoi Co. Ltd.
Multilingual corpus of TEDx talks for speech recognition and translation tasks.
Catalan speech corpus generated from Catalan Parliamentary sessions for ASR.
Recordings of African Accented French speech for accent-robust ASR research.
Dataset for training Speech LLMs for AST tasks (ASR and TTS). 10.8K hours training + 1.13K hours evaluation.
Pairs of Korean readers with 3 text/vocal sentiments. Recorded at 3 distances in 3 place types.
Human nonverbal vocal sound dataset (laughter, cries, sighs, etc.) by Deeply Inc.
Chinese Mandarin corpus by Surfingtech. 855 speakers, 102,600 utterances.
Korean speech corpus from Korean language TEDx talks.
African Languages in the Field: speech corpora for Amharic, Swahili and Wolof from the ALFFA project.
Spanish speech data mirrored from the LDC.
High-quality Mandarin singing voice corpus for singing voice synthesis research. 100 songs with note-level annotations.
Large-scale multi-singer Chinese singing voice dataset with phoneme-level annotations for SVS.
Multimodal EmotionLines Dataset with ~13K utterances from Friends TV series annotated for emotion and sentiment.
Emotional Speech Dataset with 5 emotions from 10 English and 10 Chinese speakers for emotional TTS/VC.
Restored version of LibriTTS with improved audio quality using speech restoration. Same text as LibriTTS.
Database of room impulse responses for audio augmentation and room acoustic simulation.
Curated subset of WenetSpeech for TTS training. Multi-speaker Chinese speech with quality filtering.
English and Czech speech data from the Vystadial project for dialogue systems.
Large-scale Hindi ASR dataset for the Hindi ASR Challenge 2022.
Parent-child interaction dataset (fairy tales, songs, conversation) recorded at various distances and environments.
West African Radio Corpus from the NicoLingua project for underresourced language ASR.
Puebla Nahuatl speech with transcription for endangered language documentation and ASR.
Yolóxochitl Mixtec speech with transcription for endangered language documentation.
Totonac speech with transcription for endangered language ASR and documentation.
30,000 audio samples of spoken digits (0-9) from 60 different speakers for digit recognition.
65 hours of annotated video from 1000+ speakers and 250 topics. 6 emotions with Likert scale sentiment annotations.
2,199 opinion utterances with annotated sentiment on seven Likert steps. Multimodal (audio+video+text).
9,365 emotional and 332 neutral samples by 68 native Italian speakers with 7 emotions including guilt.
2,400 recordings of 240 sentences by 4 actors with 5 primary and 5 secondary emotions for emotional TTS.
14K speech samples with simulated and live voice call degradation. Labeled with subjective quality ratings.
Clean and noisy parallel speech database at 48kHz. Voice Bank + DEMAND for speech enhancement research.
Open source dataset for source separation in noisy environments. Derived from LibriSpeech + WHAM noise.
Conversational speech simulation derived from LibriSpeech. Far-field microphone recordings of replayed conversations.
Microsoft Scalable Noisy Speech Dataset. Scalable to arbitrary sizes with various speakers, noise types, and SNR levels.
40,000 spoken captions of 8,000 natural images for audio-visual learning. 4.2 GB.
Dinner party recordings with close-talk and 5 far-field 7-mic arrays. 10 sessions of 15-45 minutes each.
100 hours from 100+ speakers annotated with emotional attributes (activation, dominance, valence) and categorical labels.
Large-scale Indian multilingual speech dataset by ARTPARK-IISc for ASR across Indian languages.
Large-scale Japanese speech corpus derived from broadcast recordings for ASR.
Multilingual African language speech dataset by Google for ASR research.
400K anime voice clips with transcriptions for speech synthesis and recognition.
Multilingual medical speech translation dataset for healthcare ASR/ST.
Large-scale Urdu speech dataset for ASR research.
Audio recordings of Breton dialects for language preservation and ASR.
Restored version of LibriTTS with speech restoration for improved audio quality. Same alignments as LibriTTS.
Full Quran recitation dataset with 127K+ audio segments by multiple reciters. Used for Quranic ASR.
Speech corpus for the Moore language (Burkina Faso) for ASR development.
Canadian French Emotional speech dataset. 6 sentences by 12 speakers with multiple emotions.
Italian emotional speech dataset. 6 actors, 14 sentences, 6 emotions.
Japanese emotional speech dataset by a male speaker with 47 emotion categories.
Wall Street Journal Hipster Ambient Mixtures. Noisy speech dataset for source separation with ambient noise.
Speech separation dataset derived from WSJ0 corpus. 2-speaker and 3-speaker mixtures for cocktail party problem.
Parallel clean-noisy speech pairs from Voice Bank corpus mixed with DEMAND noise for speech enhancement.
Domestic Environment Sound Event Detection dataset. Synthetic and real recordings of 10 sound event classes.
Voice Conversion Challenge 2018 dataset with parallel and non-parallel utterances from multiple speakers.
Voice Conversion Challenge 2020 dataset with cross-lingual voice conversion tasks.
Speech synthesis databases from Carnegie Mellon University. 4 speakers with ~1150 utterances each.
Free Vietnamese speech corpus with 15 hours from 65 speakers for ASR research.
Multi-speaker multi-style voice cloning challenge dataset for Chinese speech synthesis.
Dinner Party Corpus for far-field multi-channel conversational speech. 10 sessions.
Deep Noise Suppression Challenge dataset (2023 edition) with clean speech, noise, and room impulse responses.
Basic Arabic Vocal Emotions Dataset. 1935 recordings by 61 speakers with emotions.
Sustained Bengali Emotional Speech Corpus. 7000 utterances by 20 speakers with 7 emotions.
Persian emotional speech dataset with 3,000 utterances by 87 speakers in 6 emotions.
Centre for Speech Technology Research VCTK corpus. 44 hours from 110 English speakers with various accents.
Google Speech Commands Dataset v0.02. 105,829 one-second utterances of 35 words by 2,618 speakers.
German Distant and Close-talk Speech Corpus for ASR. Parliamentary speech data.
Multilingual sentence recordings from Tatoeba project. Crowd-sourced audio in many languages.
Multilingual read speech corpus covering 22 languages. ~20 hours per language.
IARPA Babel program multilingual speech corpus for low-resource language ASR.
Collection of free open-source speech datasets from MagicHub covering multiple languages.
Large-scale multilingual Indian speech dataset with natural and read speech from 16,237 speakers.
Multi-style multi-singer singing voice dataset with 700 songs from 20 singers.
Popular Chinese Songs corpus for singing voice synthesis research.
NUS Sung and Spoken Lyrics Corpus. 48 English songs with aligned singing and spoken versions.
NHK-NTT Hybrid Singing-Speech dataset for joint singing/speech synthesis.
Acoustic Characterization of Environments challenge dataset with room impulse responses and noise.
Extension of WHAM! with reverberant conditions for noisy reverberant speech separation.
Spatialized version of LibriSpeech with simulated room acoustics for multi-channel ASR.
Genshin Impact character voice dataset extracted from game with 424K+ audio clips.
Massively Open-source Speech and Evaluation Library. Large multilingual speech corpus.
Open Whisper-Style Multilingual data for training large-scale speech models.
TED-LIUM release 2 with 207 hours of TED talk speech and aligned transcriptions.
Large-scale Cantonese speech dataset with over 21,800 hours. Derived from WenetSpeech pipeline for Cantonese ASR and TTS research.
Collection of Multilingual Emotional Speech Corpora. Curated collection of emotional speech datasets for standardized SER benchmarking across languages.
Large-scale pre-training dataset for speech emotion detection with 11 voices, 40 emotions. Includes EmoNet-Voice Bench with expert annotations.
Open ASR models from AI2 trained from scratch on curated large-scale dataset. Fully open training data and model weights.
First open-source in-car multi-channel multi-speaker speech dataset for automotive speech research.
Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2023. Stereo/FOA spatial sound event recordings for SELD research (DCASE challenges).
LLM-powered dataset for wild domestic environment sound event detection. Extends DESED with more realistic scenarios.
West African speech corpus for Wolof, Pulaar and Sereer languages from OpenSLR.
Hebrew speech corpus by a single speaker with transcripts. 30 hours for TTS and ASR.
Automatic Speech Recognition dataset for Oromo language from OpenSLR.
Lhasa-Tibetan read-speech corpus with Kaldi-style transcripts. 33.5 hours.
Tibetan Amdo dialect speech data from NLIT, Northwest Minzu University.
Tibetan multi-dialect speech dataset with 84.33 hours covering multiple Tibetan dialects.
Audio and text corpus for the Kashmiri language for ASR research.
Rich annotated Mandarin spontaneous conversational speech data by Magic Data Technology.
High-quality open-source Kazakh speech corpus from Al-Farabi Kazakh National University. 554 hours.
Emotive single-speaker dataset for narrative storytelling with emotion and intensity annotations.
Corpus of the Silbo Gomero whistled language from 4 whistlers. 49 minutes of recordings.
Santa Barbara Corpus of Spoken American English. Naturally occurring spoken interaction from UCSB.
Short-term time-varying speaker verification dataset for studying speaker variability.
Processed speech-text paired data from Grqaser.org Armenian audiobooks.
Sinhalese multi-speaker TTS corpora from OpenSLR.
Multi-speaker TTS data for four South African languages.
Large Javanese ASR training data set containing ~185K utterances from Google.
Large Sundanese ASR training data set containing ~220K utterances from Google.
Multi-speaker TTS data for Bangladesh Bengali and Indian Bengali from Google.
Iban language text and speech corpora for automatic speech recognition.
Tunisian Modern Standard Arabic speech corpus for ASR.
Large Sinhala ASR training data set containing ~185K utterances from Google.
Large Bengali ASR training data set containing ~196K utterances from Google.
Large Nepali ASR training data set containing ~157K utterances from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Argentinian Spanish speech data with 5739 recordings.
Crowdsourced high-quality Malayalam multi-speaker speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Marathi multi-speaker speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Tamil multi-speaker speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Telugu multi-speaker speech data from Google.
Spanish speech data taken from TEDx Talks for ASR research.
Crowdsourced high-quality Catalan speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Nigerian English speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Chilean Spanish speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Colombian Spanish speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Peruvian Spanish speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Basque speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Galician speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Gujarati multi-speaker speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Kannada multi-speaker speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Burmese speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced male and female recordings of English from various UK and Ireland dialects.
Crowdsourced high-quality Yoruba speech data from Google.
Multilingual and code-switching ASR challenge dataset for low-resource Indian languages.
West African Virtual Assistant Speech Recognition Corpus from NicoLingua project.
Supplemental speech corpus to HI-MIA database with negative samples for wake-up word detection.
Free speech dataset with 24018 short audio clips of a single speaker reading sentences in Polish.
Nepali speech and corresponding text data in male and female voice for TTS.
Audio corpus of Orizaba (Veracruz) Nahuatl endangered language speech.
Audio corpus of Zacatlán-Ahuacatlán-Tepetzintla (Puebla) Nahuatl endangered language speech.
Selected Tibetan greetings speech data categorized by dialectal region.
Chinese Mandarin corpus by Shanghai Acoustics Laboratory CAS and Wuxi Sandu Intelligent Technology.
Basic Language Resource Kit 1.0 for Faroese. Speech corpus for Faroese ASR.
Kannada transcribed speech corpus for ASR from IISc-MILE.
Tamil transcribed speech corpus for ASR from IISc-MILE.
English audio of simultaneous speakers derived from LibriTTS for overlapped speech research.
Arabic speech-to-text Quran data for ASR research.
AIDC-AI large-scale long-form speech dataset for ASR and speech understanding.
Polish ASR benchmark dataset with diverse speech domains for evaluation.
Chinese dialogue speech dataset for conversational ASR and speech understanding.
Free American English corpus by Surfingtech with 10 speakers and ~350 utterances each.
Database of simulated room impulse responses for audio augmentation research.
Arabic Quran recitation dataset with multiple reciters and verse-level segmentation for ASR and Quran recognition research.
Honkai: Star Rail character voice dataset extracted from game with 186K+ audio clips in 4 languages.
Studio-recorded TTS datasets in multiple Indian languages by IISc Bengaluru for speech synthesis research.
Anti-spoofing dataset for speaker verification systems. Fifth edition of the ASVspoof challenge series with deepfake and spoofed speech.
Open-access dataset for sound event classification of outdoor environmental noise. Companion to DataSED.
Emotion perception labels for conversational speech from the Switchboard corpus. Released by Apple for SER research.
Large multilingual speech corpus from Bible recordings in 700+ languages. Designed for low-resource language research.
Arabic Natural Audio Dataset with 1,384 recordings by multiple speakers expressing 3 emotions: angry, happy, surprised.
Emotional speech sentences extracted from various films in 3 languages for speech emotion recognition.
Geneva Multimodal Emotion Portrayals. 10 actors portraying 17 emotional states including pride, relief, and tenderness.
Isolated letter speech recognition dataset (38.7 GB). Spoken letter-names for classification tasks.
347 dialogs with 9,083 system-user exchanges annotated for anger levels (garbage, non-angry, slightly angry, very angry).
Domain adaptation dataset for ASR models with 3 types of domain shifts. Derived from LibriSpeech.
20 sentences by 12 actors with 4 emotions (angry, sad, happy, neutral). Improvised emotional speech.
40 hours of emotional speech from 70+ English speakers with 6,000+ recordings for multimodal sentiment analysis.
Online Gaming Voice Chat corpus with 9,114 spontaneous and 2,656 acted utterances in 9 emotional states.
Multiple types of sound recordings from 20 Parkinson's disease patients and 20 healthy subjects for biomedical research.
Persian Consonant Vowel Combination speech corpus with 138 phonetic combination samples per speaker for ASR/speaker recognition.
Remote Collaborative and Affective Interactions corpus. 46 participants annotated for valence and arousal in spontaneous interactions.
95 dyadic conversations from 21 subjects with emotion annotations. Subjects converse with character-playing partners.
Crowdsourced high-quality Puerto Rico Spanish speech data from Google.
Crowdsourced high-quality Venezuelan Spanish speech data from Google.
Samrómur Icelandic Speech corpus focused on queries. Approved for release in December 2021.
Samrómur Icelandic Speech from children (ages 4-17 years). Approved for release in September 2021.
Samrómur Icelandic Speech with 2,200 hours of mostly unverified data. Approved for release in July 2022.
Samrómur Icelandic Speech from people with Icelandic as a second language. 150 hours.
Samrómur Icelandic Speech where users mimic utterances. 66.7 hours. Approved in September 2022.
Multi-speaker TTS data for Javanese (jv-ID) from Google.
Multi-speaker TTS data for Khmer (km-KH) from Google.
Multi-speaker TTS data for Sundanese (su-ID) from Google.
Multi-speaker TTS data for Nepali (ne-NP) from Google.
4 speakers (2 males and 2 females) expressing 5 emotions: neutral, surprise, happiness, sadness and anger.
Large-scale spontaneous podcast dataset for emotion-aware voice conversion. First VC-specific expressive speech resource from real podcasts.
First emotional speech dataset in Tamil with 936 utterances from 22 Sri Lankan Tamil speakers across 5 emotions.
Training data for Microsoft VibeVoice open-source frontier voice AI ASR model released in 2026.
Large-scale English TTS dataset used to train Parler-TTS. Includes text descriptions of speaking style for controllable generation.
Open-source dual-track conversational speech datasets for full-duplex conversational TTS. Chinese and English versions.
920 recordings from 126 patients with respiratory sounds (crackles and wheezes). Standard benchmark for respiratory sound analysis.
Sound event localization and detection dataset for DCASE 2025 Challenge Task 3 with stereo and FOA recordings.
Large-scale Japanese character voice dataset from visual novels with transcriptions for TTS research.
Nahuatl speech corpus from Mozilla Data Collective for ASR and language documentation of endangered Nahuatl variety.
Dual-channel emotional speech dataset with synchronous bone-conducted and air-conducted recordings for multimodal SER.
Multimodal emotion and intent joint understanding dataset from ICASSP 2025 Grand Challenge.
Meta combined supervised training corpus for Omnilingual ASR with transcripts across 1690 languages from multiple sources.
Large-scale multilingual speech dataset by Google covering 2000+ languages for universal speech representation learning.
Multi-channel version of GigaSpeech for far-field and multi-channel ASR research.
Audio-visual speaker recognition dataset (first version) with speaker clips from YouTube videos.
Large-scale spoken language understanding dataset with diverse intents and slot annotations for SLU research.
10K-hour English subset of Multilingual LibriSpeech with enhanced quality filtering for ASR training.
Collection of open test sets for ASR benchmarking from SpeechIO with diverse domain coverage.
Electrolarynx speech dataset for voice restoration research. Recordings from laryngectomy patients using electrolarynx devices.
Sixty recordings of one individual saying yes or no in Hebrew; each recording is eight words long. Simple baseline ASR test dataset.
Subset of LibriSpeech corpus for purpose of regression testing. Small convenient dataset for quick experiments.
Detection and Classification of Acoustic Scenes and Events 2025 challenge datasets for various audio tasks.
920 recordings from 126 patients with respiratory sounds including crackles and wheezes for automated diagnosis.
Microsoft Automatic Reading Grading dataset for children reading assessment with fluency annotations.
Speech processing Universal PERformance Benchmark. Collection of tasks and datasets for evaluating speech representations.
Multilingual extension of SUPERB benchmark for evaluating speech models across 143 languages.
Collection of speech processing benchmark datasets curated by SpeechBrain toolkit for ASR/TTS/speaker tasks.
Premium quality subset of WenetSpeech4TTS with strict quality filtering for high-fidelity Chinese TTS.
First release of TED-LIUM corpus with 774 TED talks and aligned transcriptions for ASR.
Dataset for spoken language understanding with 30,043 utterances mapped to 31 intents across 248 phrases.
Spoken Language Understanding Resource Package. Multi-domain SLU dataset with 72K audio recordings and semantic annotations.
Spoken language understanding dataset for smart-home virtual assistant commands with intent and slot labels.
Spoken language understanding dataset from Snips with 7 intents for voice assistant commands.
Sound event detection in domestic environments dataset for DCASE 2024 challenge.
Audio question answering dataset derived from Clotho with questions about audio content.
Large-scale weakly-labelled audio captioning dataset with 400K audio clips from web sources.
Audio component of MELD dataset from Friends TV series for multimodal emotion recognition.
Corpus of Regional African American Language. Sociolinguistic audio interviews with transcripts.
Dataset for counting speakers in audio mixtures. Derived from LibriSpeech with 1-10 overlapping speakers.
Dataset with 18,532 audio clips annotated with 20 sound event classes including noisy labels.
Voice of the ICE dataset with accented English speech from non-native speakers for ASR evaluation.
Collection of publicly available speech recognition datasets combined for training large ASR models by Google.
Noisy speech database for training speech enhancement algorithms. 28 speakers from VCTK mixed with DEMAND noise.
Dataset of guitar recordings with annotations for guitar transcription and source separation. 360 excerpts.
Drum recordings dataset with isolated hits and full performances for drum transcription research.
MIDI Aligned Piano Sounds dataset for automatic piano music transcription. Multiple pianos and conditions.
Collection of medical audio sounds including stethoscope recordings for healthcare audio classification.
Malfunctioning Industrial Machine Investigation and Inspection dataset with normal and anomalous sounds from 4 machine types.
Toy car and conveyor anomalous sound detection dataset for industrial anomaly detection research.
First-Shot Unsupervised Anomalous Sound Detection for Machine Condition Monitoring challenge dataset.
Collection of speech samples from speakers of many different language backgrounds reading the same English passage.
Airline Travel Information Systems audio corpus with spoken queries for flight information.
Keyword spotting dataset derived from LibriSpeech with positive and negative phrase pairs.
Wake word detection dataset with hey Snips keyword recordings from crowd workers.
Extended version of Multilingual TEDx with additional languages and hours for speech translation.
Large-scale speech-to-speech translation dataset mined from VoxPopuli with 136 language pair directions.
Expressive speech dataset with 7 speaking styles from 4 speakers. Includes read and spontaneous speech with emotions.
Global Benchmark of Linguistic and Extralinguistic Speech Features. Standardized evaluation across languages.
Air traffic control speech corpus from LiveATC with ASR annotations for ATC communication.
Air traffic control speech dataset from the HAAWAII project for ATC-specific ASR.
Audio Information Retrieval Benchmark with diverse audio understanding tasks for evaluating audio LLMs.
Dynamic extension of SUPERB benchmark with new tasks and instructions for evaluating speech foundation models.
Comprehensive benchmark for audio large language models across speech understanding and audio scene tasks.
Egocentric audio dataset from Meta Ego4D project with first-person audio recordings and annotations.
Sound descriptions dataset with audio paired with free-form text descriptions for audio-text retrieval.
Automatic Audio Captioning Dataset generated using large language models for audio captioning training.
Compositional Audio Understanding benchmark testing models on complex audio reasoning tasks.
Toronto Emotional Speech Set: 2800 audio files of two female speakers (young and old) saying 200 target words in 7 emotions (anger, disgust, fear, happiness, pleasant surprise, sadness, neutral).
Google's music captioning dataset: 5521 music clips (10s each) from AudioSet with expert-written captions describing musical attributes. Used for music generation and captioning research.
SONYC Urban Sound Tagging dataset: 3068 annotated recordings (10s each) from acoustic sensors in NYC. Multi-label annotations for 8 urban sound categories. For urban noise monitoring.
Aligned spoken articles from Wikipedia read by volunteers. English (~395h), German (~386h), Dutch (~224h). Used for ASR and TTS research.
A crowdsourced Italian emotional speech corpus with acted emotional expressions from multiple speakers, available on OpenSLR.
Google's Speech Verification Queries dataset for speaker verification research, containing diverse multilingual speech queries.
CHiME-7 challenge dataset for distant automatic speech recognition in diverse scenarios including dinner parties and meetings. Multi-channel audio with real-world noise.
Carnegie Mellon AN4 dataset: small speech corpus of alphanumeric sequences spoken by multiple speakers. Commonly used as a quick test dataset for ASR pipelines.
Buckeye Corpus of conversational speech: 40 speakers from Columbus Ohio recorded in interviews. Includes phonetic transcriptions and word-level alignments.
72 hours of meeting recordings collected at ICSI Berkeley. Multi-channel audio with detailed transcriptions and speaker annotations. Used for meeting transcription and diarization.
Third Diarization in Hard Conditions challenge dataset. Contains diverse audio from meetings, interviews, web video, and child language. Multi-domain speaker diarization benchmark.
VGGSound: large-scale audio-visual dataset with 200K+ 10-second video clips spanning 300+ sound classes. Audio extracted from YouTube videos. For audio classification and sound recognition.
Large-scale audio-visual speech dataset from BBC programmes. Thousands of spoken sentences with aligned video of speakers' faces. For audio-visual speech recognition and lip reading.
Largest publicly available audio-visual speech dataset from TED talks. Over 400 hours of video with aligned transcriptions. For lip reading and audio-visual ASR.
High-quality version of MUSDB18 music source separation benchmark. 150 full-length music tracks with stems (vocals, drums, bass, other) in uncompressed WAV format.
Slakh2100: synthesized dataset of 2100 multi-track MIDI renderings. Contains isolated stems for 34 instrument classes. Designed for music source separation research.
Free Universal Sound Separation dataset from Google. Mixtures of sounds from FSD50K for training and evaluating sound separation systems.
Google AVA-Speech: dense temporal annotations of speech activity in movies. Labels include clean speech, speech with music, and speech with noise. For voice activity detection.
Annual TTS challenge datasets (2005-2024). Each year provides speech corpora from professional speakers for building TTS systems. Various languages across years.
70 hours of Armenian speech collected via crowdsourcing with Toloka. Texts from Yerevan City Magazine. Available on OpenSLR (SLR160).
A 63-minute recording of natural conversations among multiple speakers in a realistic acoustic environment with annotations. For audio forensics and signal processing. OpenSLR SLR162.
Human judgments of perceived similarity between utterance pairs from dialogs in English and Spanish. For pragmatic analysis of speech. OpenSLR SLR152.
Subset of Kinetics video dataset focused on 32 human action classes with distinctive sounds. Contains ~22K 10-second video clips. For audio-visual action recognition.
TUT Acoustic Scenes dataset for DCASE 2017 challenge. 24 hours of binaural recordings from 15 acoustic scene categories (park, bus, metro, etc.).
TUT Sound Events 2017 dataset for DCASE challenge. Recordings from street environments with strong and weak labels for sound event detection.
119 hours of earnings call recordings from companies spanning various sectors. Transcribed and annotated for ASR benchmarking in financial domain.
Speaker diarization dataset derived from YouTube videos. Contains multi-speaker conversations with speaker turn annotations. Used in VoxSRC challenges.
Freefield1010: 7690 10-second audio excerpts from field recordings. Binary labels for presence/absence of bird sounds. For bird audio detection.
Warblr: 10000+ 10-second smartphone recordings from UK. Binary labels for bird sound presence. Crowd-sourced via the Warblr bird identification app.
Annual bird species recognition challenge dataset (LifeCLEF/BirdCLEF). Thousands of hours of recordings covering 1000+ bird species worldwide. Based on Xeno-Canto data.
Ballroom music genre dataset: 4180 audio excerpts (~30s each) labeled with dance style (cha-cha, jive, quickstep, rumba, samba, tango, waltz, viennese waltz). For rhythm and genre classification.
Large-scale music analysis dataset: audio features and metadata for 1M contemporary popular music tracks. Does not include audio directly but links to previews. Widely used MIR benchmark.
Music from the Jamendo platform under Creative Commons licenses. Used for music auto-tagging, mood classification, and instrument recognition research.
Noisy speech recognition benchmark based on WSJ. Clean and noisy versions of read speech recordings with different noise types and microphone conditions. Standard robust ASR benchmark.
Reverberant speech recognition challenge dataset. Contains real and simulated reverberant multi-channel speech recordings for distant ASR evaluation.
4th CHiME challenge dataset. Real and simulated noisy speech recordings in everyday environments (bus, cafe, pedestrian area, street). Multi-channel tablet recordings.
Noisy speech database for training speech enhancement networks. Created by mixing clean VCTK recordings with DEMAND noise at various SNRs. Widely used speech enhancement benchmark.
Singing voice conversion challenge datasets (2023). Contains parallel and non-parallel singing recordings for voice conversion research.
Mycroft Precise wake word dataset collection. Open-source recordings of wake words like 'Hey Mycroft' for training keyword spotting systems.
Updated DESED dataset for DCASE 2022 sound event detection task. Synthetic and real domestic environment recordings with strong/weak labels for 10 event classes.
Multimodal dataset combining speech audio with other modalities for affective computing research. Emotional speech annotations across multiple dimensions.
Synthetic Russian podcast-style dataset generated using Google NotebookLM. Contains conversational Russian speech for ASR research.
GigaST: large-scale speech translation corpus derived from GigaSpeech with machine-translated annotations into German and Chinese. For end-to-end speech translation.
Large-scale Taiwanese Hokkien (Taigi) speech dataset with transcriptions for ASR and TTS research. One of the largest open Taiwanese speech corpora.
Earth Species Project large-scale nature audio training set with 26M+ samples for animal sound recognition and bioacoustics research using language-model approaches.
Audio samples for drone detection and classification. Contains recordings of various drone types and background noise for UAV detection systems.
Multilingual Learned Audio Anti-spoofing Dataset for deepfake audio detection. Contains synthetic speech samples across multiple languages for spoofing detection research.
CanCLID open Cantonese speech corpus with transcriptions in Jyutping romanization. Large-scale community-driven Cantonese ASR dataset.
Dataset of water sounds and related audio for sound-based fluid analysis. Contains recordings of water pouring, flowing, and other water-related sounds.
ASLP-lab conversational turn-taking dataset for training turn-prediction models in spoken dialogue systems. Contains natural conversation with turn annotations.
Khmer (Cambodian) speech corpus for automatic speech recognition, with transcriptions aligned to audio segments.
Collection of royalty-free sound effects from SoundBible.com. Various everyday and environmental sounds for audio classification and generation.
Collection of ASMR audio recordings covering various trigger types (tapping, whispering, scratching, etc.) for audio classification and generation research.
Recordings of sounds emitted by plants under different stress conditions (drought vs watered). Novel dataset for plant health monitoring via acoustics.
Voices Obscured in Complex Environmental Settings. Far-field speech recorded in real rooms with various noise and reverberation. 12 microphones per room. Designed for robust ASR and speaker ID.
Collection of crowd-sourced vocal imitations of diverse sounds from Freesound. 11,242 imitations of 302 reference sounds. Used for query-by-vocal-imitation research.
6,000 events for surveillance: glass breaking, gunshots, and screams. Designed for audio event detection in security/surveillance scenarios.
Multi-modal Multi-scenario Multi-language Speaker Diarization dataset. Derived from real network videos with audio+video pseudo-labels for speaker diarization.
EEG-Audio-Video multimodal dataset for emotion recognition in conversational settings. 42 participants with synchronized EEG, audio and video.
1,200 utterances from 10 speakers (5M/5F) covering 6 emotions: sadness, joy, surprise, fear, anger, disgust. Text-emotion aligned.
1,000 song clips for singing voice separation research. Each clip has separate vocal and accompaniment tracks. Karaoke recordings.
Demixing Secrets Dataset: 100 full-length songs with separate bass, drums, vocals, and other tracks. Standard benchmark for music source separation.
228 30-second excerpts from Chinese pop songs with separate vocal and accompaniment tracks for singing voice separation.
Japanese Versatile Speech corpus. 100 speakers each reading 100 parallel sentences + non-parallel + whispered speech. For TTS and voice conversion.
Single singer (Kiritan) singing database with phoneme-level aligned labels. Used for singing voice synthesis (SVS) research.
10,854 MIDI files transcribed from piano recordings on YouTube. Contains ~1,237 hours of piano audio transcriptions for piano transcription and music generation.
University of Rochester Multi-Modal Music Performance dataset. 44 multi-instrument pieces with individual instrument audio, video, and MIDI. For source separation and transcription.
52,768 music-text pairs for text-to-music generation. Rich text descriptions for diverse music clips. Built for training music generation models.
1,000 crowd-sourced captions for 706 music tracks from the MTG-Jamendo dataset. For music captioning and text-to-music retrieval.
Speech-in-noise dataset for hearing aid speech enhancement. Includes head-related transfer functions, room acoustics, and hearing loss profiles. Multiple challenge rounds.
Japanese speech corpus uttered by a single female speaker. 7,696 utterances covering various domains. Widely used for Japanese TTS.
Korean Single Speaker speech dataset. 12,853 sentences recorded by a professional female voice actress. Clean studio recording for TTS.
Large-scale Japanese broadcast speech corpus from TV programs. Automatically transcribed and filtered. For Japanese ASR training.
Japanese speech corpus from YouTube. ~1,300 hours filtered from 1.4M videos. Pseudo-labeled with timestamps for ASR.
742,000 spoken captions for MS-COCO images by 2,683 speakers. Natural speech descriptions of images. For visually grounded speech models.
30 IEEE sentences corrupted by 8 real-world noises at different SNRs. Standard benchmark for speech enhancement algorithms.
Learning 3D Audio Sources challenge dataset. 3D speech enhancement and sound event localization in Ambisonics format. Office environment.
11,073 audio files annotated with 41 labels from AudioSet ontology. Freesound-sourced. Used in Kaggle audio tagging competition.
Large-scale Hindi conversational speech dataset. Crowdsourced with diverse speakers across Indian states. For Hindi ASR.
ASR dataset for 12 Indian languages created by aligning public audio with text. Pseudo-labeled with careful filtering.
Distant Automatic Speech Recognition challenge. Far-field multi-channel meeting recordings for robust ASR with multiple speakers.
Baby cry, glass break, gunshot detection in real acoustic scenes. 3 target event classes from DCASE 2017 Task 2.
465 music pieces across genres, instruments, and musical styles. Includes royalty-free music, genre classification, and instrument samples.
Speech from 1,100 children ages 4-16 reading prompted and spontaneous speech. For children's ASR research.
High-quality TTS data for 13 Indian languages with single-speaker studio recordings. For building TTS systems for Indian languages.
Free individual instrument sound samples from the Philharmonia Orchestra. Covers most orchestral instruments with multiple articulations and dynamics.
Single-note instrument recordings with quality ratings. Covers 12 instruments with metadata on pitch, dynamics, and sound quality.
6,977 audio samples of 10 different mridangam (Indian percussion) strokes recorded from 21 musicians.
100 million audio-visual clip pairs automatically curated from videos. For audio-visual self-supervised pre-training.
Multimodal dataset of instructional videos with speech, text, and video. 79,114 clips. For multimodal speech translation and summarization.
Traffic sound recordings from roads with annotations for vehicle type (car, truck, motorcycle). For traffic monitoring via audio.
Classic collection of 15 noise recordings (factory, babble, white, pink, etc.) at various sampling rates. Standard noise benchmark.
Collection of synthetic speech samples with human Mean Opinion Score (MOS) ratings. For training MOS prediction models. Multiple editions.
Dataset for speaker verification anti-spoofing. Contains genuine and spoofed speech (replay attacks). Predecessor to ASVspoof series.
Connected and isolated digit strings from 326 speakers. Classic benchmark for connected digit recognition. 77,000 digit sequences.
Wake word dataset containing 3 wake words recorded by 254 speakers in various rooms and distances. For keyword spotting in Mandarin.
1,200 sentences from 4 speakers with 6 emotions. One of the earliest Chinese emotional speech databases.
100-hour Thai speech recognition corpus with transcriptions. Studio and crowdsourced recordings.
Collection of telephone speech databases for 20+ European languages. Designed for training voice-driven teleservices.
Over 1,000 speakers reading Persian sentences in quiet environments. For Persian ASR and speaker verification.
Vietnamese speech recognition corpus from VLSP shared tasks. Multiple years of broadcast news and conversational speech.
Collection of freely available room impulse responses measured in various spaces (churches, tunnels, concert halls). For acoustic research.
Active Speaker Detection and Audio-Visual Diarization dataset from Hollywood movies. Annotated face tracks with speech activity.
Speaker Diarization Benchmark integrating 13 diverse datasets with standardized evaluation. From Interspeech 2025 paper by Argmax.
Combined corpus used for Omnilingual ASR training. Aggregates multiple public speech datasets for massive multilingual ASR.
Large-scale multimodal dialogue dataset with 40150 multi-turn dialogues spanning 41 domains and 20 emotions. Synthesized emotion-consistent speech for all dialogues.
Automatic Curation of Musical Instrument Dataset for 7-stem music source separation. Large-scale high-quality musical instrument dataset from YouTube.
Multitrack orchestral recordings for music source separation. Tchaikovsky and Mozart performed by Colibrì Ensemble at The Spheres studio.
Open-source singing voice dataset for MOS prediction. Synthesized vocals from state-of-the-art singing synthesis and conversion models rated by professional annotators.
Real-Recorded and Annotated Microphone Array Dataset for dynamic speech enhancement and source localization in real environments. Multi-channel recordings.
Common Voice Speech-to-Speech translation corpus. Massively multilingual S2ST dataset derived from Common Voice with synthesized translations.
Urban Sound Monitoring - Sound Event Detection dataset. 20000 polyphonic soundscapes synthesized from FSD50K with stereo positioning and varied loudness.
Dataset for Low-resource Indic language Multilingual and Multi-task TTS challenge. Indian language TTS training data from GIZ-supported collection.
Singing Voice Conversion Challenge 2025 dataset focused on singing style conversion (SSC). Training data for converting singing style while preserving identity.
Database of dysarthric speech from speakers with cerebral palsy or amyotrophic lateral sclerosis. Aligned with non-dysarthric control speakers.
Universal Access speech database of dysarthric speakers. 15 speakers with cerebral palsy and 13 control speakers reading isolated words.
Stuttering Events in Podcasts dataset containing 28177 clips from podcasts with annotated stuttering events including blocks repetitions and prolongations.
TalkBank corpus of speech samples from people who stutter (PWS). Includes transcriptions aligned with audio for fluency disorder research.
Dataset of synchronised Audio Lyrics and vocal notes In songs. Automatically created large-scale dataset with time-aligned lyrics at word/line/paragraph level.
CompMusic collection of Indian art music recordings (Carnatic and Hindustani). Multi-track recordings with melody annotations and editorial metadata.
Large-scale audio-text pairs dataset with 633526 audio-text pairs collected from various sources. Used to train CLAP (Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining).
Speech separation dataset created by mixing LibriSpeech utterances with noise. Two-speaker and three-speaker mixtures for source separation research.
Audio-text dataset with 5000 audio clips paired with high-quality text descriptions from AudioSet and FSD50K for audio-language learning.
Dataset of chorale music rendered with realistic instrument samples. Four-part chorales synthesized using multiple virtual instruments for source separation.
Dataset of orchestral music with multi-track recordings and annotations for music information retrieval. Score-informed source separation benchmarks.
Pre-trained models and synthetic training data for open-source wake word detection. Generated via text-to-speech for custom keyword spotting.
Second version of Toy-car ADMOS dataset for anomalous sound detection in machine operating sounds. Extended with more conditions and anomaly types.
MIMII DUE (Development of Universal Evaluation) dataset for anomalous sound detection of industrial machines. Multiple machine types with domain shift conditions.
Multi-track dataset of 10 Bach chorale recordings with four instrument stems (violin bassoon clarinet saxophone). Annotations include pitch and instrument.
Fraunhofer IDMT dataset for guitar transcription. Recordings of single notes and chords from electric and acoustic guitars with different techniques.
Learning 3D Audio Sources 2023 challenge dataset. 3D speech enhancement and sound event localization/detection in reverberant environments with Ambisonics format.
Microsoft Acoustic Echo Cancellation Challenge dataset. Real and synthetic recordings with echo reference and microphone signals for echo cancellation research.
First Clarity Prediction Challenge dataset for hearing aid speech intelligibility prediction. Noisy speech processed by hearing aid algorithms with listener responses.
First Clarity Enhancement Challenge dataset for hearing aid speech enhancement. Binaural room impulse responses with audiogram-based hearing loss simulation.
AudioSet with Strong Labels - subset of AudioSet with temporally strong annotations. Frame-level sound event labels enabling precise SED training.
ICASSP 2025 Deep Noise Suppression Challenge dataset. Extended noisy speech data with personalized speech enhancement and fullband scenarios.
Cleaned subset of VGGSound with verified audio-visual correspondence. 200K+ video clips with 300+ sound classes filtered for quality.
Foley Sound Synthesis challenge dataset. Sound effects recordings for synthesizing foley sounds across 7 classes (footstep gunshot etc).
Choral singing dataset with multi-track recordings of SATB voices singing Renaissance polyphony. Score-aligned with part annotations.
Multi-track recordings of a choir singing four-part chorales. Individual singer microphones plus room mix for choral source separation.
Electric Guitar Effects dataset. Recordings of electric guitar with various audio effects (distortion reverb chorus delay etc) for audio effect modeling.
Fraunhofer IDMT dataset for bass transcription. Electric bass recordings with note annotations for automatic music transcription.
Fraunhofer IDMT dataset for drum transcription. Drum recordings with onset annotations for automatic drum transcription research.
Audio Retrieval with Captioned Annotations dataset with 23727 audio clips from Freesound with textual captions. For audio-language retrieval research.
Freesound Dataset of mixed audio clips for sound event detection. Synthesized polyphonic mixtures from FSD50K for training SED systems.
LibriSpeech Continuous Speech Separation dataset. Replayed LibriSpeech utterances in real meeting rooms with overlap for CSS and speaker diarization research.
Multilingual Intent Detection and Slot-filling dataset. 14 languages of spoken intent classification for banking domain virtual assistants.
CMU Kids corpus of children's speech. 76 children (ages 6-11) reading prompted sentences for ASR research on children's voices.
BBC Sound Effects library with 33000+ sound effects clips from nature to urban to historical recordings. Free for personal educational and research use.
Annual free game audio bundle from Sonniss. 20000+ royalty-free sound effects and audio assets for game development and audio ML research.
VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge supplementary data. Additional test sets and metadata for speaker verification and diarization benchmarks.
Multilingual Amazon SLURP for Slot-filling Intent classification and Virtual assistant Evaluation. 1M labeled utterances across 52 languages for NLU.
Spoken Task Oriented semantic Parsing dataset. Spoken language understanding dataset for end-to-end task-oriented dialogue with audio.
Multilingual Spoken Words Corpus. 340000 keyword audio samples across 50 languages extracted from Common Voice for keyword spotting.
Audio descriptions of objects paired with images for cross-modal learning. Spoken word-image pairs for visually grounded speech models.
Cambridge-recorded version of Wall Street Journal corpus. Read English speech recorded in multiple rooms at Cambridge University for far-field ASR.
Connected digits recognition in noisy conditions. Clean and multi-condition training sets with various noise types at different SNR levels.
Brno University of Technology room impulse response database. Real RIRs measured in various rooms for speech enhancement and dereverberation.
Audio-visual emotion database. 42 subjects from 14 nationalities expressing 6 emotions (anger disgust fear happiness sadness surprise).
Acoustic Characterization of Environments corpus. Acoustic parameters noise and speech recordings from 7 different real acoustic environments.
Deep Noise Suppression Mean Opinion Score dataset. Human-rated speech quality scores for DNS Challenge submissions enabling MOS prediction model training.

Comprehensive audio multiple-choice question dataset with 571k samples for post-training Large Audio Language Models (LALMs). Features dual chain-of-thought annotations and audio-contribution filtering.
Massive dataset of over 1.1M podcast transcripts with speaker-turn labels, speaker-role labels, and speaker audio features. Comprehensive of English podcasts from public RSS feeds.
199 full-length podcast episodes with manually annotated filler words and auto-generated transcripts. CC-licensed, gender-balanced, over 350 speakers.
L2 English speech corpus for language assessment. 5000 English utterances from 250 non-native speakers (half children) for pronunciation assessment.
L2 English speech dataset with 74 minutes of audio from 15 non-native English speakers. Created as part of a university course.
Galician TTS single-speaker corpus. Phonetically and morphosyntactically rich text corpus of 16121 phrases (~168k words) comprising three subcorpora.
Galician TTS single-speaker corpus. Phonetically and morphosyntactically rich corpus of 20000 phrases (~200k words).
Multimodal Emotion Recognition and Sentiment Analysis dataset. Includes natural and scripted speech recordings, transcribed text, physiological data, and self-reported surveys from 150 participants.

Mandarin Chinese speech dataset for elderly aged 75-85. 202 speakers from 16 provinces in China. Includes ASR transcriptions, speaker annotations, and accent labels. Addresses lack of elderly speech resources.
Multi-way parallel text and speech corpus of English and six East African languages. 25000 sentences with multispeaker and studio recordings for ASR and TTS.
Jamendo music lyrics alignment benchmark. 79 songs with line-level time-aligned lyrics for automatic lyrics transcription evaluation. CC-licensed audio from Jamendo.
ASR dataset for Dyula language (West African). Contains speech recordings with transcriptions for low-resource language ASR research.
Egyptian Arabic ASR dataset from MGB-3 challenge. Broadcast speech data for Arabic dialect speech recognition.
Large-scale TTS training pool by KRAFTON with ~34.9M samples from multiple sources including Emilia. Contains transcribed speech segments for TTS model training.
Largest multilingual Indian TTS dataset derived from ASR data. 10496 speakers across 22 scheduled Indian languages. Enhanced with demixing, dereverberation, and speech enhancement pipeline.
Second generation of YODAS dataset with speech data from YouTube across 149+ languages. Includes transcriptions and word-level alignments. Massive scale multilingual speech corpus.
Large-scale multilingual speech dataset with ~125M samples. Contains word-level forced alignments and transcriptions. Derived from YouTube audio across multiple languages.
Turkmen language speech corpus for ASR and TTS research. One of the few open datasets for the Turkmen language.
Croatian language speech dataset for ASR and TTS. Part of the YodaLingua project for underrepresented languages.
Dataset for evaluating speech quality and naturalness. Contains speech samples with quality judgments for TTS evaluation research.
Cleaned version of Mozilla Common Voice Georgian dataset. Filtered and processed for higher quality ASR/TTS training.
Meeting transcription dataset from Microsoft. Far-field multi-channel recordings of meetings in real conference rooms. Designed for speaker diarization and ASR in challenging acoustic conditions.
DiariZation of SPeaker and LAnguage in Conversational Environments. Multi-lingual multi-speaker conversational dataset for speaker diarization and language diarization.
Dataset for evaluating TTS naturalness. Contains 20000 synthetic speech samples rated by listeners on a MOS (Mean Opinion Score) scale. Benchmark for TTS quality assessment.
Dataset for instruction-guided speech synthesis. Contains natural language descriptions of desired speech characteristics (style, emotion, speed) paired with speech samples.
Labeled speech data from Meta's MMS project covering 1100+ languages. Derived from religious readings with aligned text. Enables ASR for extremely low-resource languages.
Large-scale Danish ASR corpus with ~230K utterances from 616 speakers, hosted by Norwegian National Library (Språkbanken).
Swedish ASR corpus with ~366K utterances from 1000 speakers, hosted by Norwegian National Library.
Norwegian ASR corpus with ~360K utterances from 980 speakers, hosted by Norwegian National Library.
Transcribed speeches from Norwegian Parliament with 203 speakers, high-quality read-aloud political speech.
Norwegian speech database with ~7600 utterances from 380 speakers, suitable for ASR and TTS research.
Large corpus of Icelandic parliamentary speech recordings from Althingi (Icelandic Parliament) with 196 speakers.
Icelandic speech corpus with ~152 hours from 563 speakers, suitable for ASR development.
Icelandic speech corpus with ~41K recordings from 883 speakers.
Speech corpus with 720 utterances per speaker from 12 UK English speakers (6 female / 6 male).
High-quality French TTS corpus with ~10 hours from one female speaker, recorded in studio conditions.
236 hours of aligned English audio with English and French text translations, derived from LibriVox audiobooks.
262.5 hours of English speech from 1230 speakers with prosody annotations, derived from LibriVox audiobooks.
444 hours of transcribed Czech parliamentary plenary hearings, suitable for ASR research.
Massive Russian speech corpus with ~10K hours publicly available and ~10K more upon request, from various sources.
Russian TTS corpus with 145 hours from 3 male speakers, designed for speech synthesis training.
240 hours of Catalan speech from TV3 television broadcasts, suitable for ASR research.
4 hours of Chuvash language TTS data from 1 speaker, part of Turkic TTS project.
616 hours total (56h per language) across 11 South African languages (Afrikaans/English/isiNdebele/isiXhosa/isiZulu/Sepedi/Sesotho/Setswana/Siswati/Tshivenda/Xitsonga), ~210 speakers each.
Multi-modal speaker diarization benchmark dataset collected from public videos, covering rich real-world scenarios and languages with audio-visual annotations.
High-quality human-recorded speech clips captured in studio environment with clear pronunciation and consistent pacing, designed for neural TTS model training.
Acted Emotional Drama Dataset with 500 utterances by diverse actors simulating various emotions for emotion recognition research.
Emotional speech dataset with 1234 recordings from 10 speakers reading 26 text passages in 4 emotions (joy/sadness/anger/neutral).
~17 hours of transcribed Cameroon Pidgin English speech for under-resourced language ASR research.
~19 hours total (v1: 5h + v2: 14h) of recorded debate speeches from 14 speakers, with argument annotations.
Solicited cough sound recordings for tuberculosis triage testing, enabling AI-based respiratory disease screening.
24 hours of Norwegian speech from 40 speakers, hosted by Norwegian National Library.
35 hours of Czech broadcast speech from the TV show Otázky Václava Moravce (political interviews).
2 hours of German podcast speech from 2 speakers (1 female / 1 male), suitable for ASR/TTS research.
1.5 hours of Malayalam speech from 75 speakers, community-built by Swathanthra Malayalam Computing.
~8 hours of Odia language pronunciation recordings from ~20 speakers, sourced from Wikimedia Commons.
Large-scale Indian English speech dataset from NPTEL online lectures. Contains 15700 hours of lecture audio with transcriptions for ASR research.
Conversational TTS dataset with 2541 dialogues (23773 turns) between two speakers. Designed for conversational speech synthesis research.
Large-scale Russian speech-to-text dataset with 20000+ hours from various sources including audiobooks and YouTube. One of the largest open Russian ASR corpora.
Diverse multilingual synthetic text and audio dataset for TTS training. Uses LLMs to generate varied text prompts for improved TTS diversity and naturalness.
144 synthesized emotional audio files labelled by 40 listeners. Emotion defined in terms of valence and arousal without speech content.
Recordings and transcriptions by diverse speakers for emotional TTS. Covers 4 emotions: general/neutral joy anger and sadness.
Open source test dataset for source separation in noisy environments with variable overlap ratio. Derived from LibriSpeech signals for speech separation evaluation.
Open source test dataset for source separation derived from VCTK signals and WHAM noise. Designed for cross-dataset speech separation experiments.
Over 2000 minutes of audio-visual data from 398 people across 6 cultures. Annotated with valence and arousal for emotion recognition research.
400 utterances by 38 speakers (27 male and 11 female) in Urdu. Covers 4 emotions: angry happy neutral and sad.
Noisy speech recognition challenge dataset with recordings from home environments. Contains annotated audio chunks for environmental sound classification.
Spatial semantic segmentation of sound scenes dataset for DCASE 2026 Challenge. Features stereo SELD with first-order Ambisonics room impulse responses.
Environmental noise dataset for sound event classification from outdoor environments. Published in Scientific Data (Nature) with machine learning focus.
2519 speech samples produced by 100 actors from 5 cultures. Demonstrates that prosody can communicate at least 12 distinct kinds of emotion across cultures.
Multi-accent English speech corpus with 4 Indian and 1 native English accent. Contains read speech recordings for accent classification and recognition.
Spoken language identification dataset derived from Common Voice. Contains utterances labeled by language for language identification tasks.
Dataset of fake audio generated by various neural vocoders (WaveGlow MelGAN etc). Designed for audio deepfake detection research.
Anti-spoofing challenge dataset with logical access (LA) and physical access (PA) partitions. Contains genuine and spoofed speech for speaker verification anti-spoofing.
Audio Deep Synthesis Detection challenge dataset. Contains various types of synthesized/manipulated Chinese speech for deepfake audio detection.
Dataset for prompt-based TTS with natural language style descriptions. Pairs text prompts describing speaking style with corresponding speech.
25863 music clips (29-second each) annotated with 188 tags. Widely used for music auto-tagging and music information retrieval research.
Blizzard VoiceMOS Challenge Corpus. Large-scale listening test dataset for synthetic speech quality assessment with MOS ratings.
Sensor-based Indoor Noise dataset. Continuous recordings from distributed sensor nodes in home environment for sound event detection.
Noise sources in German Environments dataset for sound event localization and detection. Contains spatial audio recordings with annotations.
Multi-Annotator Captioned Soundscapes dataset. Contains audio recordings with multiple captions per clip for audio captioning research.
Pitch Tracking Database from Graz University of Technology. Contains speech recordings with laryngograph signals for pitch tracking evaluation.
Japanese Newspaper Article Sentences read speech corpus. Contains read speech from newspaper articles for Japanese ASR research.
Large-scale video dataset with 700 action classes from YouTube. Audio tracks widely used for audio event classification and audio-visual learning.
Extended Chinese celebrity speech corpus for speaker recognition. Contains more speakers and diverse recording conditions than CN-Celeb.
Speaker recognition dataset from multimedia sources with unconstrained conditions. Contains real-world audio from interviews and presentations.
60000 hours of unlabeled English speech from LibriVox audiobooks. Designed for semi-supervised and self-supervised speech representation learning.
Speech translation dataset derived from LibriSpeech with French translations. Used for end-to-end speech translation research.
Subset of Emilia dataset sourced from YODAS with CC-BY license. Large-scale in-the-wild speech for speech generation research.
Evaluation benchmark for zero-shot TTS systems from ByteDance. Contains test sets for speaker similarity and naturalness assessment.
Training data subset for CosyVoice TTS model by Alibaba. Multi-speaker multi-lingual speech synthesis training corpus.
LibriTTS with prosodic annotations including pitch prominence and boundary tone labels. Designed for expressive TTS research.
Broadcast news speech corpus from DARPA Hub-4 evaluations. Contains North American English broadcast news recordings with transcriptions.
Subset of ESC-50 with 10 environmental sound classes (400 clips). Simpler benchmark for environmental sound classification.
Multimodal dataset with continuous ASL videos and aligned English speech/text. Contains ~80 hours for sign language translation research.
Speech Quality and Intelligibility Measures dataset from TorchAudio. Contains speech samples with objective quality scores for non-intrusive quality estimation.
UTokyo-SaruLab MOS prediction system training data. Contains MOS-labeled synthetic speech for automatic quality assessment.
Dataset of a cappella flamenco singing for melody extraction. Contains annotated pitch contours for music information retrieval.
Orchestra dataset for melody extraction evaluation. 64 excerpts of orchestral music with annotated melody lines.
Digital Archive of Mobile Performances with 300 songs sung by 30 singers in 2 takes. Collected via karaoke app for singing voice research.
Children song dataset with singing voice and MIDI alignment. Contains recordings of children songs for singing voice synthesis.
NUS-48E extended dataset with sung and spoken lyrics. 48 English songs sung by 12 professional singers for lyrics alignment research.
Japanese singing voice database by a single female singer. Designed for singing voice synthesis research.
Japanese singing voice database for singing voice synthesis. Contains recordings of a single female singer with musical score alignment.
Japanese singing voice database by a single female singer. Contains singing recordings for voice synthesis research.
Japanese Versatile Speech - Music subset. Contains singing voice recordings from 100 speakers for singing voice research.
Small-scale singing voice dataset with vocal performances in Spanish. Includes multi-track recordings with isolated vocals.
Training data for Meta's SeamlessM4T massively multilingual speech translation model. Includes speech-to-text and speech-to-speech data.
Dataset for speech/music/noise segmentation from INA. Contains broadcast media with annotations for speech activity detection.

Synthetic medical speech dataset (v1+v2) for fine-tuning Whisper-based ASR on clinical/nursing terminology. 226975 audio-text pairs from Kokoro-82M TTS with 19 voices across 3 English accent groups. Terms from RxNorm/FDA/LOINC/CMS.
Filtered Uzbek speech dataset with 503K+ samples for ASR. Crowdsourced recordings with transcriptions covering diverse speakers and accent regions across Uzbekistan.
Turkish educational speech dataset extracted from Khan Academy Turkish lectures. 27K+ samples for Turkish ASR training with educational content.
Hebrew crowd-sourced speech dataset for Whisper fine-tuning. Contains crowd-recited recordings with timestamp-aligned transcripts for Hebrew ASR.
Context-Aware Decision Benchmark for Turn-Taking evaluation in full-duplex spoken dialogue. Real and synthetic audio samples with 4-class turn-taking actions and 14 fine-grained intent labels.
Corpus for Evaluating ASR quality. Multi-system ASR transcription benchmark based on public speech corpora with outputs from commercial and open-source ASR systems for comparative evaluation.

Sanskrit speech corpus by IIT Bombay with 45,953 sentences at 22kHz. Covers diverse domains including literature, stories, radio programs, and extempore discourse. One of the largest open Sanskrit speech resources.

Curated multilingual speaker verification dataset derived from Mozilla Common Voice with cleaned speaker labels. Designed for cross-lingual speaker verification and anti-spoofing research. Used in TidyVoice 2026 Challenge at Interspeech.
High-quality English emotional speech dataset with 20,000+ samples featuring fine-grained emotion labels via natural language descriptions. Designed for emotion-controllable TTS research.
Large-scale multilingual speech deepfake dataset with 3M+ fake samples from 40 speech synthesis tools (TTS, voice conversion, neural vocoder). For deepfake detection research.
Saraiki language TTS dataset from Mozilla Data Collective with clear and natural speech recordings and text transcripts. For speech synthesis and language technology applications.

Largest descriptive emotion dataset with 115K video-description pairs featuring 2K+ fine-grained emotion categories. Created for multimodal emotion recognition using MLLMs. Part of AffectGPT framework.
Singing quality assessment dataset with 7,981 vocal clips rated by professional annotators. Extends SingMOS with lyrics, melody, and overall quality annotations for SVS/SVC evaluation.
Paired throat microphone and acoustic microphone recordings from 60 native Korean speakers. 6000 utterance pairs for deep learning-based throat mic speech enhancement research.

In-the-wild speech deepfake detection dataset combining real speech from 1,250+ VoxCeleb speakers with synthetic speech from 23 TTS systems trained on noisy real-world data. For SDD and SASV research.
Bilingual English/Spanish benchmark for evaluating speech spoofing and deepfake detection against modern LLM-era TTS and voice conversion systems.
Real-world multimodal Mandarin meeting dataset with 360° panoramic video, 8-channel far-field audio, and close-talk recordings. For audio-visual speaker diarization, ASR, and meeting summarization.
Massively multilingual code-switching speech dataset with 113 unique language pairs across 52 languages. 4 test sets for code-switched ASR and speech translation evaluation.
First large-scale multilingual and multi-ethnic code-switching dataset. 420K CS text samples and 80+ hours of audio from 174 speakers representing 18 countries/regions. NeurIPS 2025.
Comprehensive Mandarin speech dataset for young children. Open-source for academic purposes. For child ASR, educational technology, and child-computer interaction research.
Sundanese TTS dataset from Mozilla Data Collective using Priangan dialect. For linguistic research, cultural documentation, and regional language technology development.
